form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up 14th of 16 at Sanliurfa on March 9 over 1300m, 82 len behind Kaanhakan carrying 55.5kg at $34.35. Last start 12th of 14 at Sanliurfa on March 16 over 1700m, 47 len behind Sarraftay carrying 58.5kg at $20.05. Safely held last time out but this suits.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 9 at Sanliurfa on March 18 over 2100m, 44 len behind Yenal carrying 63kg at $9.20. Before that 7th of 16 at Sanliurfa on March 4 over 1400m, 24 len behind Dumrul with 57kg at $34.30. Can atone for a modest effort last time.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign fourth of 7 at this track November 26 over 1900m, 16 len behind Zeynepcankizi with 63kg at $5.90. When resuming last campaign fourth in a small field at Yil July 30 2024 over 1600m, 14 len behind Ikimiz with 50kg at $34.15. Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: At the latest run second last of 10 at Sanliurfa on March 25 over 1900m, 49 len behind Derbeder Ali carrying 56.5kg at $6. The race before that crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 5th of 14 at Sanliurfa on March 9 over 1300m, 14 len behind Muhlishan with 62kg at $5.85. Expected to finish much closer.

form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 9 at Sanliurfa on March 18 over 2100m, 6 len behind Yenal with 61.5kg at $2.35. The start before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Sanliurfa on March 2 over 2000m, 22 len behind Caputhan carrying 60.5kg at $7.15. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months ran last of 11 at this track on April 1 over 2000m, behind Oguzbeyi carrying 60kg at $24.60. Previously second-up 18th of 21 at Sirinyer All Weather on June 7 over 1600m, 35 len behind Samsat with 57kg at $41.35. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of ten weeks. Finished off last preparation eighth of 12 at Osmangazi All Weather February 6 over 1400m, 9 len behind Tekomer with 57kg at $20.35.
